overall_justification: While acknowledging potential downsides and opposing viewpoints, the main editorial on the Caixa de Conversão emphasizes its necessity in the context of inconvertible paper money and celebrates the Chamber of Deputies' vote as an act of patriotism aligned with the Convênio de Taubaté. The overall tone and framing suggest an endorsement of the Caixa's creation, outweighing the more neutral reporting in other sections of the paper.

supporting_evidence.quote: A Camara approvou o projecto por 115 votos contra 25.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: Highlights the significant majority vote in favor of the Caixa, presented as a positive outcome.

supporting_evidence.quote: cumprimos o nosso dever felicitando a camara dos Srs. deputados pelo que nos parece ser um acto de elevado patriotismo, do mesmo elevado patriotismo que inspirou os illustres presidentes dos Estados de São Paulo, de Minas e do Rio de Janeiro na sua reunião de Taubaté.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: Directly expresses the newspaper's support for the vote and links it to the Convênio de Taubaté, a key driver of the Caixa's creation.

supporting_evidence.quote: Tanto se tem dito e tanto se tem escripto acerca da creação dessa instituição, que só pode apparecer onde ha papel-moeda inconvertivel, que toda a gente ficaria perplexa ante as vantagens ou desvantagens de tal instituição...
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: Acknowledges the complexity of the debate but contextualizes the Caixa as a necessary response to existing monetary problems.
